raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/year> - XXXX wrote Barclay 's Card Services requesting action against XXXX XXXX XXXX ( ACL ) for a refund of {$490.00} for airfare, which ACL received a refund from XXXX XXXX and {$6900.00} for cruise as ACL failed to provide the services to get me to the cruise departure site. Airfare was booked by XXXX. I provided Barclay 's will the letter and documents I sent to ACL. 

XX/XX/year> - Barclay 's letter to XXXX stated " ... unable to obtain credit on your behalf because we were not provided with the nature of the dispute prior to the charge being disputed. '' XX/XX/year> - XXXX called Barclay 's and was informed that ACL would not cooperate and that they could not refund the {$8300.00} charged. I informed the agent I did not request {$8300.00} and only the amount noted in XX/XX/year> letter. Agent advised XXXX to send a letter to reopen dispute. 

XX/XX/year> - XXXX again sent a letter to Barclay 's as instructed stating the same request in the XX/XX/year> letter. 

XX/XX/year> - Barclay 's letter to XXXX again said they can not refund {$8300.00}, WHICH WAS NOT REQUESTED, for the following : " Insufficient proof that the merchant has violated the invoice/contact 's terms of service. Merchant has not violated the terms of the contract. ''
